title: Rotate search API key: Perplexity embedding API key - keynear@hotmail.com
body:
## Task

Rotate the 1Password item `zzvrihqejvqivwswlsbncbtfda` (Perplexity embedding API key - keynear@hotmail.com) per the v14590 rotation plan.

## Vendor console

URL: https://www.perplexity.ai/settings/api

## Steps

1. Log in to the vendor console (MFA required).
2. Generate a new API key (or revoke + re-create for Telegram bots).
3. Update the 1Password item `zzvrihqejvqivwswlsbncbtfda` field `credential` with the new value via `op item edit`.
4. Re-run `v14590_capture_fingerprints.py --verify --uuid zzvrihqejvqivwswlsbncbtfda` to log `new_sha256`.
5. Re-run `secrets-bootstrap --service <affected-service>` if the secret feeds a service.

## Audit

- Old SHA-256: `sha256:f5414545a6fec92268b178960140b5bdc62425be403144fa22aaf51a01673224`
- New SHA-256: (capture after rotation)
- Field: `credential`
- 1Password UUID: `zzvrihqejvqivwswlsbncbtfda`

## Carry-forwards

- Closes CF-v14573-01 (this item is one of 17 rotatable items in v14590 plan).
